name: Janet's Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops in a skillet.
2. In a crockpot, layer ingredients as follows: 1 pork chop, 1/6 of chopped onion, 1/6 of chopped bell pepper, enough ketchup to cover with a thin layer.
3. Repeat layers until all ingredients are used.
4. Pour water into the crockpot.
5. Cook in crockpot on HIGH for 3 hours.
